Calculate installment programs down payments according to specified input

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"productSetCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product set code, this will limit further calculations"},"price":{"type":"object","properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (133000 represents 1330) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["amount","currency"],"description":"Goods price"}},"required":["productSetCode","price"],"example":{"productSetCode":"COCHCONL","price":{"amount":133000,"currency":"CZK"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Down payments information - minimal, maximal and available step","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"minimum":{"type":"object","properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["amount","currency"],"description":"The lowest down payment amount, e.g. 0 (0 CZK/EUR)"},"maximum":{"type":"object","properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (250000 represents 2500 CZK/EUR) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["amount","currency"],"description":"Maximum down payment amount, e.g. 2500 (2 500 CZK/EUR)"},"step":{"type":"object","properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (50000 represents 500 CZK/EUR) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["amount","currency"],"description":"Size of one step between the lowest and maximum down payment amounts, e.g. 500 (500 CZK/EUR). Available down payments could be (min 0, max 2500): 0, 500, 1000, 1500, 2000, 2500"}}},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"minimum":{"amount":0,"currency":"CZK"},"maximum":{"amount":250000,"currency":"CZK"},"step":{"amount":50000,"currency":"CZK"}}}}}}},"400":{"description":"Error in processing request","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"errors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"Unique internal error code"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Human readable error description (non-localized)"},"severity":{"type":"string","enum":["ERROR","WARN","INFO"]},"attribute":{"type":"string","description":"JSON path of request attribute that caused the error (if applicable)"},"ticketId":{"type":"string","description":"Internal ticket ID, used for error backtracking"}},"required":["code","message","severity"]},"description":"Array with errors"}},"required":["errors"]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"errors":[{"code":"BAD_REQUEST","message":"Bad request","severity":"ERROR","attribute":"customer.addresses[1].streetNumber","ticketId":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4"}]}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
